summary: POTUS retweet of the White House 'Full circle moment' clip: a short video set to music that cuts from Marco Rubio at a press podium ('January 2026') and a vintage photo of a man in sunglasses and a tracksuit, to a present-day full-body shot of Rubio ('May 2026') in a grey Nike Tech Fleece tracksuit standing against a wood-paneled wall.

script.scene: Rubio at a press podium in front of an American flag, speaking; on-screen text 'January 2026'. Music with lyric '...And now we don't know, now you'.
Cut to a grainy vintage photo of a man in dark wraparound sunglasses, a mustache and a light tracksuit holding a drink in a wood-paneled room; on-screen text 'January 2026'.
Cut to a present-day full-body shot of Marco Rubio standing against a wood-paneled wall in a grey Nike Tech Fleece zip hoodie and joggers with sneakers, hands in pockets; on-screen text 'May 2026'.
The same full-body shot of Rubio in the tracksuit held on screen, 'May 2026' caption.
Final hold on Rubio in the grey tracksuit, 'May 2026'.

notable_text: On-screen: 'January 2026', 'May 2026'. Tweet: 'RT @WhiteHouse: Full circle moment'. Lyric snippet: 'And now we don't know, now you'.
